charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1101_010:
[Name:PlayerNickname ] came across
Raifort and Gengar in a forest at night.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_030:
As a teacher, I suppose I should caution you
against wandering around at night.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_050:
There are suspicious rumors surrounding
these ruins, so I came to investigate.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_060:
But in the end, I couldn’t find anything of
interest.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_070:
Although, my hopes were not high in the first
place, with this artificial island’s ruins being
fake and all.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_080: Why do you have that look in your eye?
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_090:
You say I shouldn’t approach places with
strange rumors, as they could be dangerous?
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_100:
If I let every single rumor about curses or
hexes scare me, I wouldn’t be able to
quench my thirst for knowledge.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_110:
Which, in turn, would mean my historical
research wouldn’t progress!
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_120:
While you’re here, allow me to teach you
something.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_130:
History is a profound thing. In it lies relics
of historical value that cannot be assessed
easily.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_150:
In Paldea, there’s talk of treasures of ruin
inhabited by curses.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_160:
In truth, those treasures are said to be four
Pokémon that were sealed away to suppress
a disaster.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_170:
Their existence may be key to unraveling
history’s enigmas.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_180:
...What do you think? Doesn’t that pique your
intellectual curiosity?
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_0401_200: Heh. I see you have potential.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_0402_220: Good grief. You’re a cautious one.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_230:
Don’t resist your thirst for knowledge—your
intellectual curiosity! Got it?
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_240:
If you want to learn something, go forth!
Experiment! Investigate!
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_250: Gengar seems to be of the same opinion.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_260:
Returning to our talk of curses, this Gengar
also has quite the interesting background.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_270:
Pokédex entries across each region contain
countless rumors of it casting curses and
stealing life force.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_280:
I won’t be bored with him by my side.
He’s a good partner.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_290:
After all, people, Pokémon, and history
are more interesting with a little darkness
to them.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_300:
However, touching that darkness comes with
a price.
charaepi_ch0348_00_raifort/2301_1201_310:
If you’re thinking of getting to the bottom
of Gengar and me...
